meta.title: Beyond Aid: How Philanthropy and Partnerships Can Drive Global Prosperity
meta.description: The 2012 Index of Global Philanthropy and Remittances was released at this event, which showcased new statistics on private giving to the developing world for the year 2010. The distinguished panel discussed the changing architecture of foreign assistance and its implications for international development.
